comment: 58yo female with primary Sjögren's syndrome (EULAR/ACR 2016 criteria: anti-Ro/SSA+, anti-La/SSB+, focal lymphocytic sialadenitis on minor salivary gland biopsy, sicca symptoms 8 years), no current lymphoma. Strongest hematologic-cancer risk among rheumatic diseases (~15-20x RR for MALT lymphoma, lifetime incidence ~5-10%). Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-SJOGREN-MALT-LYMPHOMA-PREVENTION-SURVEILLANCE (annual physical + lab monitoring including cryoglobulins/C4/SPEP/Ig + parotid US for any new/persistent swelling); alternative = IND-SJOGREN-MALT-LYMPHOMA-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION (rheumatology-driven, workup only on clinical suspicion). Validates v0.3 RF-SJOGREN-MALT-LYMPHOMA-PREVENTION pilot.
